steps.title: Spot the main topic
steps.content: A 2009 study concluded that ocean acidification affects fish behavior. The passage then examines concerns about this conclusion's reliability, focusing on sample size and potential bias.

steps.title: Match the topic to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice D directly addresses effects of ocean acidification on fish behavior. Options A, B, and C discuss entirely different topics—overfishing, fishing technology, and predator behavior—that never appear in the passage. This matches choice D — D is correct.
